title: AS-01 — Add product with valid fields
preconds: User is signed in as an admin and on the admin products page.

steps_separated.content: Navigate to the Admin Products page
steps_separated.expected: Products page is displayed with list of products and 'Add Product' button
Product creation form is shown with fields for name, description, price, category, etc.

steps_separated.content: Fill in all required fields with valid data (e.g., name: 'Dog Toy', price: 10.00, category: 'Toys', pet: 'Dog')

steps_separated.expected: Product is created and user is redirected to the products list

steps_separated.content: Verify the new product appears in the catalog
steps_separated.expected: The created product 'Dog Toy' is visible in the products list

title: AS-01 — Update existing product
preconds: User is signed in as an admin and an existing product exists.

steps_separated.content: Navigate to the Admin Products page
Find an existing product in the list
Click 'Edit' or the product to edit
steps_separated.expected: Product edit form is shown with current values

steps_separated.content: Update a field (e.g., change price from 10.00 to 15.00)

steps_separated.expected: Product is updated and user is redirected to the products list
The product's price is now 15.00 in the list

title: AS-01 — Delete existing product
preconds: User is signed in as an admin and an existing product exists.

steps_separated.content: Navigate to the Admin Products page
Find an existing product in the list
Click 'Delete' button or action for the product

steps_separated.expected: Product is deleted and user is redirected to the products list
The product no longer appears in the products list
